global_flags.name: profile
global_flags.usage: use a specific profile for this command

commands.short: Manage Viceme CLI authentication
Start or continue the Viceme device login flow

flags.name: device-code
flags.usage: continue a previously started device authorization

flags.name: no-wait
flags.usage: return the device authorization immediately

flags.name: timeout
flags.usage: maximum time to poll for authorization

commands.short: Revoke and remove local Viceme credentials
Show local Viceme authentication status
Persist the npm CLI, install its Viceme Skill, and initialize configuration

flags.name: region
flags.usage: Viceme region: cn or global (defaults to the selected profile region)

flags.name: target
flags.usage: Skill target: auto, codex, or claude

commands.short: Read and control durable Skill Agent publications
Cancel a publication

flags.name: yes
flags.usage: confirm cancellation

commands.short: Get a publication's durable status
Resolve a typed next action on the same publication

flags.name: action-id
flags.usage: typed action receipt ID

flags.name: expected-payload-digest
flags.usage: digest of the action payload being answered

flags.name: payload-stdin
flags.usage: read the structured action answer from stdin

commands.short: Wait for a bounded publication result

flags.name: timeout
flags.usage: maximum time to wait

commands.short: Manage Viceme CLI profiles
Add a new profile

flags.name: name
flags.usage: profile name (required)

flags.name: region
flags.usage: Viceme region: cn or global (defaults to the selected profile region)

flags.name: use
flags.usage: switch to this profile after adding

commands.short: List all profiles
Remove a profile and its local credentials
Rename a profile
Switch to a profile (use '-' to toggle back)

flags.name: dry-run
flags.usage: validate and print the operation without calling Viceme

flags.name: expression-stdin
flags.usage: read a copied provider expression from stdin

commands.short: Create a durable Skill Agent publication

flags.name: client-request-id
flags.usage: idempotency key for this publication action

flags.name: dir
flags.usage: deterministically archive and upload a Skill directory

flags.name: dry-run
flags.usage: validate and print the operation without reading input or calling Viceme

flags.name: expected-target-version
flags.usage: expected CAS version of an existing Target

flags.name: expression-stdin
flags.usage: read a copied provider expression from stdin

flags.name: file
flags.usage: upload a Skill archive

flags.name: new-target
flags.usage: create a new logical Agent Target

flags.name: resolution-id
flags.usage: publish an immutable snapshot returned by inspect

flags.name: skill-root
flags.usage: select a Skill root within the immutable source

flags.name: target-alias
flags.usage: owner-scoped alias for a new Target

flags.name: target-id
flags.usage: publish to an existing Target

flags.name: target-locale
flags.usage: target locale for compiled instructions

flags.name: timeout
flags.usage: maximum wait duration

flags.name: wait
flags.usage: wait for a bounded publication result

flags.name: yes
flags.usage: confirm the public publication side effect
